global.title: Trump says Iran strikes 'in honor' of slain US troops in Jordan, Iraq - Reuters
global.summary: The U.S. has entered a ninth consecutive day of strikes on Iran after American service members were killed in Jordan and Iraq. The conflict appears to be widening rather than easing.
global.whyItMatters: Pastors may need to help people process fear, grief, and questions about war, justice, and peace.

global.title: Palestinians hold funerals for those killed in Israeli strikes - Reuters
global.summary: Families in Gaza are mourning after fresh Israeli strikes in Deir al-Balah and Gaza City, with funerals and damaged homes marking another painful day for civilians.
global.whyItMatters: This keeps the human cost of war in view and can guide prayer, lament, and compassionate preaching.

global.title: Germany upgrades security stance to 'high threat level', interior minister tells paper - Reuters
global.summary: Germany has raised its national security posture to a high threat level, reflecting growing concern over extremist violence and broader instability.
global.whyItMatters: Heightened security fears in Europe shape the wider climate of anxiety many congregants already feel.

canadian.title: Trump suggests Canada pay damages for wildfire smoke - CNN
canadian.summary: Donald Trump said Canada should pay damages for wildfire smoke drifting into the U.S., adding a new diplomatic edge after speaking with Prime Minister Mark Carney.
canadian.whyItMatters: This is a fresh development in a story affecting Canadian identity, cross-border relations, and public concern over wildfires.

canadian.title: Pit found by Quebecer confirmed to be a 390-million-years-old meteorite impact crater - CTV News
canadian.summary: A pit discovered by a Quebec resident has now been confirmed as an ancient meteorite impact crater dating back roughly 390 million years.
canadian.whyItMatters: It offers a wonder-filled, creation-aware story that can spark reflection on humility, curiosity, and God's vast world.

persecutedChurch.title: Church of England votes to hear Palestinian Christians on Israeli genocide in Gaza - Middle East Eye
persecutedChurch.summary: The Church of England's General Synod voted to hear testimony from Palestinian Christians through Kairos Palestine, signaling a willingness to listen amid intense pressure and controversy.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It highlights the witness of suffering Christians in the Holy Land and invites informed prayer and pastoral awareness.

persecutedChurch.title: Palestinians report settler arson attack on mosque in Tuwani, in the West Bank - The Times of Israel
persecutedChurch.summary: Reports say settlers set fire to a mosque in Tuwani in the West Bank, another sign of rising religiously charged violence in the region.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Even when Christians are not the direct target, escalating sectarian violence deepens instability for all faith communities in the Holy Land.

leadership.title: 3 Psychological Safety Strategies Every Leader Can Take Action On - Forbes
leadership.summary: This piece urges leaders to build trust by admitting mistakes, inviting honest feedback, and asking, 'What am I missing?' before major decisions.
leadership.whyItMatters: A pastor leading staff and volunteers can use this immediately to foster candor, health, and wiser discernment.

goodNews.title: Dog reunited with owners after being lost for nearly 10 days - NBC News
goodNews.summary: A dog was safely reunited with its owners after being missing for nearly 10 days, offering a small but welcome story of relief and joy.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A gentle story like this can lighten the emotional load of a heavy news cycle and remind people that restoration still happens.
